Title: Aarav
Bio: Works between drawing and model, testing how a threshold can hold both a pause and a crowd. Interested in the quiet infrastructure of everyday movement.

Title: Diya
Bio: Collects thresholds — benches, steps, ledges — and asks what each one asks of the body. Field notes and slow section drawings.

Title: Kabir
Bio: Long-caption thinker. Builds arguments the size of a paragraph and then tries to draw them in one line.

Title: Meera
Bio: Sound and section. Records the room before she draws it, so the plan remembers how it felt to stand there.

Title: Saanvi
Bio: Maps the in-between: the twenty metres nobody designs. Interested in edges, verges and the accidental public.

Title: Vikram
Bio: Structure as narrative. Likes a drawing that admits how it was made.

Title: Ananya
Bio: Between reference and reverie — builds a reading list into every project and lets it wander.

Title: Tara
Bio: Time-based drawing — the same corner, redrawn every week, until the change becomes the subject.

Title: Neel
Bio: Model-maker. Believes the fastest way to understand a space is to build it badly, twice.

Title: Priya
Bio: Writes the brief she wishes she'd been given, then answers it. Interested in care as a design constraint.
